name: Gf Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. This is a special recipe made without gluten.
2. Sift the dry ingredients (soya flour, potato starch flour, and salt).
3. Beat together the sugars and margarine in a bowl until well combined.
4. Add the egg and vanilla to the mixture, stirring until just mixed.
5. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Fold in the chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
1 cookie - 1 fruit/vegetable choice, 1 fat
Source: A Guide for the Diabetic Celiac, 1990 ISBN 0-921026-02-1 Canadian Celiac Assoc.
